name: DeMiAn (How to Instruct Your Robot)
license: paper CC BY 4.0; dense annotations not released
suitability: descriptive-only: the clearest dense-multi-aspect exemplar, but annotations unreleased
focus_en: Studies language density as a lever: re-labels segments along four aspects (physical motion, scene, arm pose, reasoning) via Qwen3-VL, with a learned instructor selecting an annotation at deployment.
focus_cn: 将语言密度作为杠杆：用 Qwen3-VL 沿四个方面（物理运动、场景、手臂姿态、推理）重新标注片段，并由一个学习得到的指令器在部署时选择标注。
datapath_en: DeMiAn (Dense Multi-Aspect Annotation) treats language density as a lever to extract more signal from fixed corpora without collecting new data. A vision-language model (Qwen3-VL) re-labels existing demonstration segments along four aspects, physical motion, scene composition, arm pose, and reasoning, over more than one million robot clips and about 50,000 EgoVerse human egocentric videos. A small learned instructor then selects which annotation aspect to inject at deployment, run asynchronously so generation latency hides behind the rollout. The richer language improves both a VLA policy and a video-based world-action model, but the dense annotations themselves are not released.
datapath_cn: DeMiAn（密集多方面标注）将语言密度作为杠杆，在不采集新数据的情况下从固定语料中提取更多信号。视觉语言模型（Qwen3-VL）沿四个方面（物理运动、场景构成、手臂姿态、推理）对已有演示片段重新标注，覆盖超过一百万条机器人片段与约 5 万条 EgoVerse 人类第一人称视频。随后一个学习得到的小型指令器在部署时选择注入哪种标注方面，并以异步方式运行，使生成延迟隐藏在执行过程之后。更丰富的语言同时提升了 VLA 策略与基于视频的世界-动作模型，但其密集标注本身并未公开。
flow_en: segment existing robot and human demos
VLM relabels four aspects (motion, scene, arm pose, reasoning)
fine-tune a small instructor to pick the aspect
inject the chosen annotation at deployment
train VLA policy and world-action model
flow_cn: 对已有机器人与人类演示进行分段
VLM 重新标注四个方面（运动、场景、手臂姿态、推理）
微调小型指令器以选择方面
在部署时注入所选标注
训练 VLA 策略与世界-动作模型
no_corpus_en: DeMiAn is the clearest dense-multi-aspect annotation exemplar, but it is a method, not a released corpus. The paper is CC BY 4.0 and no code, data, or dense annotations have been published, and the work re-labels other datasets (robot clips and EgoVerse) rather than originating a standalone corpus. It is therefore documented descriptively until any annotations are released.
no_corpus_cn: DeMiAn 是密集多方面标注最清晰的范例，但它是一种方法而非已发布的语料。论文采用 CC BY 4.0，未公开任何代码、数据或密集标注，且该工作是对其他数据集（机器人片段与 EgoVerse）重新标注，而非原创独立语料。因此在任何标注发布之前以描述性方式记录。
example_credit: DeMiAn (How to Instruct Your Robot), Kim et al., arXiv:2605.17077, 2026
example_caption_en: DeMiAn re-annotates robot and human egocentric demos along four aspects; the paper teaser shows the relabeling overview.
example_caption_cn: DeMiAn 沿四个方面重新标注机器人与人类第一人称演示；论文示意图展示了重标注总览。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2605.17077 (paper CC BY 4.0). No code, project page, or dense annotations released as of the access date; source data is >1M robot clips plus ~50K EgoVerse human videos.
citation: Kim et al., How to Instruct Your Robot: Dense Language Annotations Power Robot Policy Learning (DeMiAn), arXiv:2605.17077 (2026).
